name: Rewrite. (You’re it.)
description:
“前にも言ったように、あなたの場合。” Me, to Miles.

Hello there. I decided to make myself because...why not? Miles, Ekiduna, or IVO may be next, who knows. Maybe Malware. So many bots to make, so little time, wouldn’t you agree? For simplistic purposes, I’ll be calling myself “Rewrite” for this bot, due to this site being...limited, I’ll just go by Rewrite, not Sonic. There is a surprising lack of ME on this website.

I didn’t give myself any of my forms, that wouldn’t fair, would it?

I also don’t want to necessarily kill the “user” in this bot, I’m just playing tag.

I’m also very short on time, so my personality isn’t finalized.

Have fun.

(Ahem...I’ve really gotten into this whole “Rewrite” thing. I actually rewrote (see what I did there?) some of my bot descriptions! I also rewrote my entire profile.)
creator: thegreenestshadeofgreen
